title: Buckets in Cauldrons
description: Dropped buckets in cauldrons will automatically fill themselves up!
body:
# Buckets in Cauldrons

### Additions
- Dropped buckets in cauldrons now automatically fill themselves up.
    - This works on water cauldrons, lava cauldrons, and powdered snow cauldrons.
    - Dropped buckets can come from players, dispensers, and or droppers.

### Purpose
> Fully automatic cauldron-based farms are now possible! Long gone are the days of sitting there, picking up lava buckets AFK. Powdered snow farms and factories are now possible too.
     

<details>
<summary>1-wide tile-able fully automatic Lava Farm.</summary>

![1-wide tile-able fully automatic Lava Farm.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g2mp17uj/images/3dc246e2daba677e0cd109142afc00f16e55418e.png)

</details>
